meaning: 塞瓦斯托波尔[苏联克里米亚半岛西南岸港市]
examples: Balaclava is a remote district of Sevastopol.
Children are playing in ruined Sevastopol, first years after the war.
In the west of Sevastopol, the Greek ruins of the city of Chersoneses date back to 5 BC.
Farther west, on the other side of the Crimean Peninsula, the storm caused a freighter carrying scrap metal to sink off the coast of Sevastopol.
